title: Batch Emails for assignee with multiple items

Description
We have board with more than 800 items, in which 100 of items are getting assigned to one user, he gets 100 emails (1 for each assignment) 
What are you trying to achieve

posts.author: yamini (Yamini Bhola)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We have board with more than 800 items, in which 100 of items are getting assigned to one user, he gets 100 emails (1 for each assignment)

What are you trying to achieve

we want to send out only one email instead of multiple emails.
